title: Don't void Arrows
description: this mod makes arrows not vanish when they hit a mob, they will instead drop as an item on death
body:
***This mod makes arrows not vanish when they hit a mob, they will instead drop as an item on death.***

I would recommend playing this mod with a mod like "Pierce Arrow" so you can actually see the arrows that are stuck in the mobs.


[CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dont-void-arrows)


*this mod made using mcreator*
